children.text: Last summer, my family decided to go somewhere special, so we took a train to Yunnan for an unforgettable holiday.
The countryside scenery along the way was fantastic.
children.cn: 沿途的乡村风景非常迷人。
去年夏天，我全家决定去一些特别的地方，所以我们坐火车去云南度过了一个难忘的假期。

children.text: When we arrived at the old town of Lijiang, we stayed in a comfortable hotel.
Although we stayed there for only a few days, we enjoyed it very much.
children.cn: 虽然我们只在那里呆了几天，但我们非常享受它。

children.text: For example, we hiked in the beautiful Yulong Mountain, which took our breath away.
children.keywords: hited Yulong Mountain, took breath away
children.cn: 例如，我们在美丽的玉龙雪山远足，它简直令人叹为观止。
当我们到达丽江古镇时，我们住进了一家舒适的旅馆。

children.text: What's more, everything tasted delicious, especially the famous steamed chicken soup.
It was such a wonderful experience that everyone hopes to go back again.
children.cn: 这是一次如此美妙的经历，以至于大家都希望再次回去。
而且，一切吃起来都很美味，尤其是著名的汽锅鸡。
